The user wants me to:
1. Load the `gchat` skill using `skills_tool:load`
2. Follow its instructions to fetch and cache Google Chat conversations
3. The skill auto-detects the number of days to look back
4. It requires Chrome DevTools at `192.168.1.11:9223` with Google Chat in 3-panel view
5. Wait for the skill to complete fully (5-15 min) - DO NOT INTERRUPT
6. On completion, load the `notify-user` skill and send a success notification
7. On failure, load the `notify-user` skill and send an error summary with priority 4
